name: Chandan Singh
title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
headline: Java · Spring Boot · Angular · Azure · Kubernetes · DevOps
profileImageAlt: Chandan Singh — Senior Full Stack Engineer
summary: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 9+ years designing and modernizing enterprise applications using Java, Spring Boot, Angular, REST APIs, microservices, SQL, and DevOps automation. Experienced across healthcare, insurance, payments, and e-commerce—delivering cloud-native platforms, reusable UI standards, and secure integrations.
aboutParagraphs: I partner with technical leads, product owners, DevOps teams, and Agile squads to remove delivery roadblocks, define reusable UI and API standards, and ship reliable software.
My work spans platform modernization (Java 8→21), accessible Angular component libraries, Spring Boot microservices, and automated CI/CD on Azure and Kubernetes.
I value clean architecture, security-first delivery, and documentation that helps teams move faster.
differentiators: Led enterprise platform modernization across 40+ REST services (Java 8 → 21) with zero-downtime release patterns
Built publishable Angular component libraries with accessibility-oriented patterns (WCAG/ARIA)
Full-stack ownership: API design, UI delivery, K8s/Helm deployment, and architecture documentation
Regulated-industry experience: healthcare, insurance, and payments with security-first practices
certifications: AZ-204: Developing Solutions for Microsoft Azure
Terraform for Absolute Beginners with Labs
